arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo explains why he has been surprised by Tottenham
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest manager Nuno Espirito Santo has expressed his surprise at Tottenham's struggles in the Premier League this season. Having managed Spurs for a brief period in 2021, Nuno is well aware of the club's capabilities, making their current 16th position all the more astonishing.

arts.ttl: James Maddison sends Jude Bellingham message as Real Madrid bounce back from Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: James Maddison has sent Jude Bellingham a message following Real Madrid's 1-0 win over Athletic Bilbao. The Tottenham midfielder said: "There is big competition, a lot of quality in the squad.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest name Anthony Elanga price tag amid rumours of possible Man United reunion
Ruben Amorim has already outlined Bodo/Glimt's biggest threats to Tottenham after Man Utd example
arts.sum: Bodo/Glimt will come up against English opposition for the second time in the Europa League this season when they travel to Tottenham in May. The Norwegian side have shocked quite a few in the 2024/25 edition of the competition after managing to progress to a semi-final showdown against Spurs . Speaking in his pre-match press conference ahead of the game, the Portuguese boss opened up on the threat Bodo/Glimt would pose his team.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Nottingham Forest – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur entertain Nottingham Forest tonight, whose ambitions of Champions League qualification are in danger of slipping away. Forest have dropped outside of the Premier League top five after losing their last two matches. The club’s success this campaign can partly be attributed to their overall clean bill of health. Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou hails influential Dominic Solanke as Richarlison pushes for rare start
arts.sum: Dominic Solanke scored the goal which sent Spurs into the Europa League semi-finals, but could get a rest tonight against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: “My head is at Fulham” – Marco Silva insists he’s focused on PL side amid Tottenham links
arts.sum: Marco Silva insists he’s committed to Fulham amid recent claims linking him to other clubs, including Tottenham Hotspur. On Sunday, Fulham suffered a 2-1 defeat to Chelsea in the league. After the tie, Silva had a chat with DAZN in Portugal and A Bola have relayed his comments.
